summary: Excellent audience recording with rich Beyer cassette sound; no specific performance details provided
review: Capt. Greg highlights this as a great audience tape, praising the richness and warmth of the Beyer source. While the audio quality is praised as excellent, there are no comments on the musical performance or setlist.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one highly positive review focusing on recording quality; lack of show details limits confidence in overall rating

recording_quality.technical_notes: Rich Beyer cassette sound, clear and full‑bodied with good ambient capture
